/usr/bin/c++ -pthread CMakeFiles/LightingControl.dir/bluetooth/bluezagent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LightingControl.dir/bluetooth/bluezclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LightingControl.dir/bluetooth/btcontrol.cpp.o -lz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgio-2.0 -lpangomm-1.4 -lglibmm-2.4 -lcairomm-1.0 -lsigc-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lrsvg-2 -lm
